ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene or pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene or pathway */,
  "gene_location" TEXT /* Chromosomal location of the gene */,
  "gene_sequence" TEXT /* Nucleotide sequence of the gene */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Known functions of the gene */,
  "gene_family" TEXT /* Gene family to which the gene belongs */,
  "taxonomic_id" TEXT /* Taxonomic identifier for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "taxonomic_id" TEXT /* Taxonomic identifier for the species */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Natural habitat of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Typical diet of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulation_effects" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation effect */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene or pathway */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of regulation (e.g., upregulated, downregulated) */,
  "lifespan_effect" TEXT /* Effect on lifespan (e.g., reduce, extend) */,
  "study_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the study where the data was derived */,
  "regulation_magnitude" TEXT /* Magnitude of the regulation effect (e.g., fold change) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the regulation effect (e.g., p-value) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions under which the regulation was observed */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Description of the experimental design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulation_effects_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulation_effects_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissues" (
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tissue */,
  "tissue_name" TEXT /* Name of the tissue or organ */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tissue or organ */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue (e.g., epithelial, connective) */,
  "anatomical_location" TEXT /* Anatomical location of the tissue */,
  "function" TEXT /* Primary function of the tissue */,
  "cell_types" TEXT /* Types of cells present in the tissue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "differential_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each differential expression entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene or pathway */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue */,
  "expression_type" TEXT /* Type of expression (e.g., upregulated, downregulated) */,
  "fold_change" TEXT /* Fold change in gene expression */,
  "p_value" TEXT /* Statistical significance of the differential expression */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure differential expression */,
  "sample_size" TEXT /* Number of samples used in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_differential_expression_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_differential_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_differential_expression_tissue_id FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_id") REFERENCES tissues ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissue_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tissue expression entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene or pathway */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue */,
  "expression_level" TEXT /* Level of gene expression in the tissue */,
  "expression_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of gene expression (e.g., constitutive, inducible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tissue_expression_tissue_id FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_id") REFERENCES tissues ("tissue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tissue_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "researchers" TEXT /* Names of the researchers involved */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the study */,
  "research_institution" TEXT /* Institution where the research was conducted */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., observational, experimental) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Detailed methodology used in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene or pathway */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "module_accessed" TEXT /* Module or section of the system accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene or pathway */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* Alternative name or alias for the gene */,
  "alias_source" TEXT /* Source of the alias (e.g., NCBI, Ensembl) */,
  "alias_type" TEXT /* Type of alias (e.g., synonym, abbreviation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_aliases_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "impact_factor" TEXT /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "open_access" TEXT /* Whether the publication is open access */,
  "funding_agencies" TEXT /* Agencies that funded the research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene interaction */,
  "gene_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first gene or pathway */,
  "gene_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second gene or pathway */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., activates, inhibits) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_mechanism" TEXT /* Mechanism of the interaction (e.g., protein-protein, DNA-protein) */,
  "interaction_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the interaction (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  "interaction_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the interaction */,
  "interaction_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_gene_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id_1") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_gene_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id_2") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)
